response_text:
ENTITY Airport
PK airport_id
ATTR airport_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR airport_code : varchar

ENTITY City
PK city_id
ATTR city_id : varchar : PK
ATTR city_name : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_id
ATTR airline_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK airplane_id
ATTR airplane_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airplane_model : varchar
ATTR airplane_registration : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR flight_status : varchar
ATTR flight_status_datetime : datetime

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_id
ATTR status_id : varchar : PK
ATTR status_name : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR crew_first_name : varchar
ATTR crew_last_name : varchar
ATTR crew_role : varchar

ENTITY CrewAssignment
PK assignment_id
ATTR assignment_id : integer : PK
ATTR crew_id : varchar : FK
ATTR flight_id : varchar : FK

REL CrewAssignment -> CrewMember : 1 -> 0..N : FK=crew_id
REL CrewAssignment -> Flight : 1 -> 1..N : FK=flight_id
